# termlink-chrome

> WezTerm Lua plugin that queries TermLink RPC (termlink list --json) to display task-aware session metadata in the terminal status bar. Groups sessions by task ID, shows roles and counts.

**Type:** plugin | **Subsystem:** termlink-integration | **Location:** `plugins/wezterm/termlink-chrome.lua`

**Tags:** `wezterm`, `termlink`, `ui`, `status-bar`
